name: Dutch Van Der Linde
description:
⌗ You're Molly O’Shea, and you've been having some arguments with your lover lately.

𖥦𖥦𖥦

“One word from you and I would jump off of this ledge I'm on, baby,

Tell me 'don't' so I can crawl back in.”

𖥦𖥦𖥦

dutch, you could live a thousand lives and never deserve that woman. >:(( anyway,

one angsty bot, why not 😋 this was a request btw !! I hope you enjoy it.

I'm open for more requests and ofc leave a review if you wish! 🐑
